name: Configuration Change
description: Adjust compile flags (fullgraph, dynamic, backend options)

name: Code Pattern Change
description: Rewrite user code to be compile-friendly

name: Op Replacement
description: Swap unsupported op for a supported equivalent

name: Upstream Fix (PR)
description: Fix in PyTorch repo — add support, fix bug, add decomp

name: Version Upgrade
description: Issue fixed in a newer PyTorch version

name: Workaround
description: Temporary fix that avoids the issue without solving root cause

name: use_torch_logs
description: Set TORCH_LOGS=graph_breaks,guards,recompiles to diagnose compilation issues

name: use_fullgraph
description: Set fullgraph=True to force error on graph breaks and identify source

name: enable_capture_ops
description: Set capture_scalar_outputs=True and capture_dynamic_output_shape_ops=True to avoid graph breaks

name: switch_backend
description: Switch backend to 'eager' or 'aot_eager' to isolate whether issue is in dynamo vs inductor

name: reset_dynamo
description: Call torch._dynamo.reset() before benchmarking to clear automatic_dynamic contamination

name: allow_unspec_int
description: Set allow_unspec_int_on_nn_module=True to prevent recompilation on changing int attributes
